items.title: rustfs/rustfs
items.content:
🚀2.3x faster than MinIO for 4KB object payloads. RustFS is an open-source, S3-compatible high-performance object storage system supporting migration and coexistence with other S3-compatible platforms such as MinIO and Ceph.

Language: Rust
Stars: 16986
Forks: 737
items.contentSnippet:
🚀2.3x faster than MinIO for 4KB object payloads. RustFS is an open-source, S3-compatible high-performance object storage system supporting migration and coexistence with other S3-compatible platforms such as MinIO and Ceph. 
Language: Rust 
Stars: 16986 
Forks: 737
items.creator: rustfs
items.summary: RustFS是一款开源的S3兼容高性能对象存储系统，采用Rust语言开发，性能优于MinIO，尤其对4KB对象负载速度快2.3倍。该系统支持与MinIO、Ceph等其他S3兼容平台迁移和共存。目前拥有16986个星标和737次分叉。
